privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and accurate. The task requires creating two WooCommerce global product attributes: 'Color' with terms [Black, White, Blue, Red, Green, Grey] and 'Material' with terms [Cotton, Polyester, Denim, Wool, Leather]. Three specific products must have these attributes assigned: 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) with Color=Black and Material=Cotton; 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' (SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32) with Color=Blue and Material=Denim; and 'Merino Wool Sweater' (SKU: MWS-GRY-L) with Color=Grey and Material=Wool. All product SKUs exist in the environment, created via WP-CLI setup scripts. The metadata accurately reflects the task requirements and aligns with verifier expectations.
